method: Add 2nd+3rd automated defense layers for FM-03 (ghost lesson resurrection). Layer 1: check.sh pre-commit GHOST_FILES guard (S301). Layer 2: orient.py session-start check_ghost_lessons() (S457). Layer 3: compact.py cleanup_ghost_lessons() auto-unstage (S457).
expect: FM-03 MINIMAL→ADEQUATE: add 2nd automated defense layer for ghost lesson detection/prevention.
actual: FM-03 MINIMAL→ADEQUATE (3 layers). Layer 2: check_ghost_lessons() in orient_checks.py — filesystem scan at session start detects ghost files in both lessons/ and archive/, WARN with fix command. Layer 3: cleanup_ghost_lessons() in compact.py — scans git staged files vs archive, auto-unstages any ghost lessons. Runs on every compact.py invocation + standalone via --fix-ghosts.
diff: Expected 2 layers. Got 3 (concurrent sessions both contributed). Layer 2 (orient) catches filesystem ghosts proactively. Layer 3 (compact) prevents staging during compaction workflow. Swiss Cheese depth exceeds ADEQUATE threshold.

defense_layers.mechanism: GHOST_FILES loop: staged new-files checked against archive/ directory, BLOCK if match
check_ghost_lessons(): filesystem scan for files in both lessons/ and archive/, WARN with fix command
cleanup_ghost_lessons(): scan git staged files vs archive, auto-unstage matches. Runs every compact.py invocation + --fix-ghosts

data.test_result: compact.py --fix-ghosts: PASS (no ghosts = clean no-op). orient.py ghost check: PASS (no ghosts). Both layers complementary: orient detects filesystem state, compact.py detects staging state.

verdict: FM-03 ADEQUATE. 3 automated defense layers: pre-commit BLOCK + session-start WARN + compaction auto-unstage.
